title: A bar for each base from your tally table — then a codon looked up to a creature
todo: Finish count_bases() to build a bar for each base: A, T, C, G!

stages.label: Tally
stages.caption: ✅ One bar per base: 3 A's, 3 T's, 1 C, 1 G — all from one table!

stages.label: Look up
stages.caption: 🐻 The codon GGG looked straight up to a bear — that's the genetic code!
